headlines.title: First responders exposed to fentanyl in deadly New Mexico incident, officials say
headlines.description: First responders were exposed to fentanyl and sickened after arriving at a rural New Mexico home earlier this week to investigate a possible overdose that left three people dead, officials said Friday.

headlines.title: No child deaths definitively linked to covid shots, FDA says
headlines.description: No child deaths have been definitively linked to Covid vaccines, according to a report from the Food and Drug Administration that was quietly made public last week.

headlines.title: Absence of USAID likely slowed Ebola detection and response, former officials say
headlines.description: The Trump administration hollowed out USAID last year, but the State Department denied the changes have hampered its response.

headlines.title: From Omaha Steaks to hazmat suits: What life was like for contagion patients in quarantine
headlines.description: As more than 40 Americans remain in quarantine for up to six weeks following a hantavirus outbreak aboard a cruise ship, former patients who spent time inside some of the country’s highest-security medical isolation units during previous viral contagions are sharing what it’s like to endure weeks cut off from the outside world.

headlines.title: Good news: You don’t need surgery. But you’ll have to apply maggots to your wound.
headlines.description: The lowly maggot gets a bad rap, mostly known for feeding on corpses and rotting meat.

headlines.title: Mindfulness vs. Meditation: How You Can Fit Both in Your Day
headlines.description: In honor of mental health awareness month, Dora Kamau, lead mindfulness teacher at Headspace, joins TODAY to teach some best practices for practicing mindfulness and meditation to improve wellbeing. She breaks down how mindfulness throughout the day can help improve quality and quantity of sleep, explains how important it is for parents to practice meditation with their children, and more.

headlines.title: NASCAR Super Star Kyle Busch Dies at 41 After 'Severe Illness'
headlines.description: The racing world is in shock by the sudden death of legendary NASCAR driver Kyle Busch at the age of 41 after he was hospitalized with a "severe illness," according to his family. Tributes poured in on speedways across the country from Indianapolis to Charlotte, and fellow racing star Dale Earnhardt Jr. wrote in part, “I will never be able to make sense of this loss.” NBC’s Kaylee Hartung reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: US-Bound Flights With Ebola Risk to Go to Dulles for CDC Testing
headlines.description: United States officials have announced a new plan to stop the fast-moving Ebola virus from arriving in the country, requiring flights carrying passengers who’ve visited Ebola-affected countries in Africa to land at Washington Dulles International Airport where the CDC will conduct enhanced health screenings. Meanwhile, new video shows a medical clinic in the Democratic Republic of Congo engulfed in flames after authorities say protesters were angry that officials wouldn’t release the body of

headlines.title: Ebola treatment center set alight in Congo
headlines.description: An Ebola treatment center in the Democratic Republic of Congo was set alight as a group tried to retrieve the body of a person who died of the virus. The treatment center was not operational but was used to store bodies before a proper burial, an important step in containing Ebola outbreaks.

headlines.title: Is the Forme Power Bra really worth $179?
headlines.description: I tested the Forme Power Bra for five months to see if it could improve my posture and back support. Here’s what actually happened.

headlines.title: The best running watches, tested over hundreds of miles
headlines.description: I’ve tested dozens of running watches from Garmin, Coros, Amazfit, Fitbit, Apple and more. Here are my top picks for beginners, races and ultra-athletes alike.

headlines.title: The best men’s walking shoes of 2026, tested and reviewed
headlines.description: Shop expert-recommended and staff-tested men’s walking shoes from Brooks, On, New Balance and Hoka.
